title: Token Convergence
summary: Established single source of truth for design tokens, integrated with Tailwind theme and CSS variables, purged hard-coded colors from components, and added lint guardrails.

rationale.tokenMap: Design token map already exists at src/lib/design-system/tokens.ts with comprehensive Zod validation. Includes palette (base, surfaces, interactive, brand, semantic), spacing, radius, shadows, and typography scales.
rationale.tailwindIntegration: tailwind.config.ts already references tokens and maps them to Tailwind theme extensions. Uses semantic color function to reference CSS variables.
rationale.cssVariables: globals.css already defines :root and .dark mode CSS variables for all semantic colors and tokens. No conflicting ad-hoc variables found.
rationale.colorPurge: Replaced hard-coded colors in dashboard/page.tsx (green-500/red-500 -> success/destructive tokens), progress.tsx (border-black/white -> border-foreground), and hero-video.tsx (purple-600 -> primary/80). SVG brand colors in tech-stack-section.tsx are legitimate and preserved.
rationale.lintGuardrails: ESLint config already includes custom design-system/no-hardcoded-colors and design-system/no-inline-styles rules with appropriate exceptions for dynamic styles (progress, carousel, slider, etc.) and demo files. Created TypeScript hex scanner script for CI validation.

verification.tokenSchema: ✅ Zod schema validates all tokens on build
verification.tailwindTheme: ✅ Tailwind extends from tokens for colors, radius, shadows, spacing, typography
verification.cssVars: ✅ CSS variables defined for light and dark modes
verification.eslintRules: ✅ Custom rules enforce no hard-coded colors and no inline styles in production code
verification.hexScanner: ✅ CI script scans for unapproved hex/rgb/hsl values
verification.semanticTokens: ✅ Dashboard uses success/destructive instead of green/red

mitigated.risk: R1 - Token drift between Tailwind config and globals.css
mitigated.mitigation: Single tokens.ts source feeds both Tailwind theme and CSS variable documentation

mitigated.risk: R2 - Hard-coded colors bypass token system
mitigated.mitigation: ESLint rules + CI hex scanner prevent new hard-coded colors; existing ones replaced

nextSteps: JAR-02: Regenerate shadcn primitives to ensure token alignment
JAR-02: Consolidate cn helpers and toast systems
JAR-02: Enforce import hygiene with ESLint rules
